gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor where students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, clutching resumes inside branded folders, where healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; additionally, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, while event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, with career counselors reminding attendees to maintain eye contact; moreover, consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Alumni volunteers are sharing quick pep talks near the coffee station, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, clutching resumes inside branded folders, while event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance; furthermore, dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, where healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables; a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and career counselors are reminding attendees to maintain eye contact.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Event staff are scanning registrations and handing out lanyards at the entrance, while students are lining up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, clutching resumes inside branded folders; dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor where healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; additionally, alumni volunteers are sharing quick pep talks near the coffee station, consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, while a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and career counselors are reminding attendees to maintain eye contact.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, clutching resumes inside branded folders, where event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance; furthermore, dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, where healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; also, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, while a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and career counselors are reminding attendees to maintain eye contact.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, clutching resumes inside branded folders, where event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance; furthermore, dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, where healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, while tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; also, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and career counselors are reminding attendees to maintain eye contact, while a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, clutching resumes inside branded folders, where event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance; furthermore, dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, where healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and alumni volunteers are sharing quick pep talks near the coffee station, while a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and career counselors are reminding attendees to maintain eye contact.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Alumni volunteers are sharing quick pep talks near the coffee station, while healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos; additionally, event staff are scanning registrations and handing out lanyards at the entrance, while students are lining up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, clutching resumes inside branded folders, where tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and career counselors are reminding attendees to maintain eye contact; furthermore, consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, clutching resumes inside branded folders, while event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance; furthermore, dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, where healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and alumni volunteers are sharing quick pep talks near the coffee station, while a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and career counselors are reminding attendees to maintain eye contact.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
